requirement_topic.en: CE Marking under RED — TTJA Enforcement in Estonia
requirement_topic.zh: RED下的CE标志 — TTJA在爱沙尼亚的执法
requirement_topic.zht: RED下的CE標誌 — TTJA在愛沙尼亞的執法

summary.en: Estonia is an EU member state and fully implements the Radio Equipment Directive (RED) 2014/53/EU. CE marking is mandatory for all radio equipment (including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT devices) before placement on the Estonian market. The conformity assessment route for most Wi-Fi/Bluetooth products is the self-declaration pathway (Module A — internal production control): the manufacturer applies harmonised standards EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 (radio), EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17 (EMC), and EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11 (safety), draws up an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC), and affixes the CE marking. The national regulatory authority is TTJA (Tarbijakaitse ja Tehnilise Järelevalve Amet — Consumer Protection and Technical Regulatory Authority), which enforces RED compliance through market surveillance and technical product safety oversight. CCC and FCC certifications are not recognised in Estonia as substitutes for CE marking. Market context: Estonia is the most digitally advanced EU member state (e-Estonia, X-Road, digital identity) with very high IoT and smart-device market penetration; CERT-EE (under RIA) is one of the EU's most active cybersecurity enforcement bodies, meaning that cybersecurity-related elements of CE marking under RED will receive especially close attention.
summary.zh: 爱沙尼亚是欧盟成员国，完全实施无线设备指令（RED）2014/53/EU。所有无线电设备（包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙及蜂窝物联网设备）在投放爱沙尼亚市场前必须加贴CE标志。大多数Wi-Fi/蓝牙产品的合格评定路径为自我声明路径（模式A——内部生产控制）：制造商适用协调标准EN 300 328 / EN 301 893（无线电）、EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17（电磁兼容）及EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11（安全），起草欧盟合格声明（DoC）并加贴CE标志。国家监管机构为TTJA（爱沙尼亚消费者保护与技术监管局），通过市场监督和技术产品安全监管执行RED合规。在爱沙尼亚，CCC和FCC认证不被认可为CE标志的替代。市场背景：爱沙尼亚是数字化程度最高的欧盟成员国（e-Estonia、X-Road、数字身份），物联网和智能设备市场渗透率极高；CERT-EE（隶属于RIA）是欧盟最活跃的网络安全执法机构之一，意味着RED下CE标志中网络安全相关要素将受到尤为严格的审查。
summary.zht: 愛沙尼亞是歐盟成員國，完全實施無線設備指令（RED）2014/53/EU。所有無線電設備（包括Wi-Fi、藍牙及蜂窩物聯網設備）在投放愛沙尼亞市場前必須加貼CE標誌。大多數Wi-Fi/藍牙產品的合格評定路徑為自我聲明路徑（模式A——內部生產控制）：製造商適用協調標準EN 300 328 / EN 301 893（無線電）、EN 301 489-1 + EN 301 489-17（電磁相容）及EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11（安全），起草歐盟合格聲明（DoC）並加貼CE標誌。國家監管機構為TTJA（愛沙尼亞消費者保護與技術監管局），通過市場監督和技術產品安全監管執行RED合規。在愛沙尼亞，CCC和FCC認證不被認可為CE標誌的替代。市場背景：愛沙尼亞是數位化程度最高的歐盟成員國（e-Estonia、X-Road、數位身份），物聯網和智能設備市場滲透率極高；CERT-EE（隸屬於RIA）是歐盟最活躍的網路安全執法機構之一，意味著RED下CE標誌中網路安全相關要素將受到尤為嚴格的審查。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU (Radio Equipment Directive — RED), transposed into Estonian law via Raadioseadmete seadus (Radio Equipment Act of Estonia)
Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — market surveillance and compliance of products (enforced by TTJA in Estonia)
EN 300 328 v2.2.2 — 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth radio performance
EN 301 893 v2.1.1 — 5 GHz RLAN radio performance (with DFS mandatory for channels 52–140)
EN IEC 62368-1:2020+A11:2021 — electrical safety (harmonised under RED)

summary.en: In China, market access for wireless devices requires SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) Type Approval from the National Radio Administration (NRA/MIIT) for any radio transmitter, CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA-C17-01 for IT equipment, and MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) for terminal equipment connecting to public telecom networks. These are all pre-market licences. Neither SRRC type approval nor CCC is recognised in Estonia or elsewhere in the EU as equivalent to CE marking under RED. The Chinese self-declaration concept does not exist — all approvals are government-issued licences.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备进入市场须取得：国家无线电管理局（NRA/工业和信息化部）颁发的SRRC型号核准（适用于所有无线发射器）、依据CNCA-C17-01对IT设备进行的CCC（中国强制认证），以及接入公共电信网络的终端设备所需的工业和信息化部网络准入许可（NAL）。上述均为上市前许可证。在爱沙尼亚或欧盟其他地方，SRRC型号核准和CCC均不被认可为RED下CE标志的等效认证。中国不存在制造商自我声明的概念——所有批准均为政府颁发的许可证。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線設備進入市場須取得：國家無線電管理局（NRA/工業和信息化部）頒發的SRRC型號核准（適用於所有無線發射器）、依據CNCA-C17-01對IT設備進行的CCC（中國強制認證），以及接入公共電信網路的終端設備所需的工業和信息化部網路准入許可（NAL）。上述均為上市前許可證。在愛沙尼亞或歐盟其他地方，SRRC型號核准和CCC均不被認可為RED下CE標誌的等效認證。中國不存在製造商自我聲明的概念——所有批准均為政府頒發的許可證。

standards_or_laws: SRRC / NRA Type Approval — mandatory radio licence for wireless transmitters (MIIT/NRA)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA-C17-01 for IT equipment; CNCA-C25-01 for telecom terminals)
MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — mandatory for terminal equipment accessing public telecom networks

gap.en: Complete gap: SRRC, CCC, and NAL do not satisfy CE marking under RED for the Estonian (EU) market. Chinese manufacturers must: (1) test to RED-applicable harmonised EN standards at an ILAC MRA-member or EU-accredited laboratory; (2) draw up an EU Declaration of Conformity referencing all applicable directives and harmonised standards; (3) affix CE marking (minimum 5 mm) to the product or packaging; (4) appoint an EU Authorised Representative if no EU importer assumes that role; (5) ensure technical documentation is retained for 10 years. TTJA conducts market surveillance in Estonia and has authority to withdraw non-compliant products from the market and impose administrative penalties. Estonia's high IoT market penetration and CERT-EE's active cybersecurity posture mean that Chinese-branded wireless and IoT products should expect particularly thorough RED conformity checks, especially regarding cybersecurity clauses in the DoC.
gap.zh: 存在完全差距：SRRC、CCC和NAL不满足爱沙尼亚（欧盟）市场的RED下CE标志要求。中国制造商须：（1）在ILAC MRA成员或欧盟认可实验室按RED适用协调EN标准进行检测；（2）起草欧盟合格声明，引用所有适用指令和协调标准；（3）在产品或包装上加贴CE标志（最小5 mm）；（4）如无欧盟进口商承担该职责，须委任欧盟授权代表；（5）确保技术文档保存10年。TTJA在爱沙尼亚开展市场监督，有权将不合规产品从市场撤回并处以行政处罚。爱沙尼亚极高的物联网市场渗透率和CERT-EE积极的网络安全态势意味着中国品牌无线和物联网产品应预计将受到尤为严格的RED合规检查，尤其是合格声明中的网络安全条款。
gap.zht: 存在完全差距：SRRC、CCC和NAL不滿足愛沙尼亞（歐盟）市場的RED下CE標誌要求。中國製造商須：（1）在ILAC MRA成員或歐盟認可實驗室按RED適用協調EN標準進行檢測；（2）起草歐盟合格聲明，引用所有適用指令和協調標準；（3）在產品或包裝上加貼CE標誌（最小5 mm）；（4）如無歐盟進口商承擔該職責，須委任歐盟授權代表；（5）確保技術文件保存10年。TTJA在愛沙尼亞開展市場監督，有權將不合規產品從市場撤回並處以行政處罰。愛沙尼亞極高的物聯網市場滲透率和CERT-EE積極的網路安全態勢意味著中國品牌無線和物聯網產品應預計將受到尤為嚴格的RED合規檢查，尤其是合格聲明中的網路安全條款。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU as transposed into Estonian law via Raadioseadmete seadus; CE marking required before market placement; enforced by TTJA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC Type Approval + CCC (where applicable) + NAL (where applicable); does not substitute for CE

source.publisher: TTJA — Tarbijakaitse ja Tehnilise Järelevalve Amet (Consumer Protection and Technical Regulatory Authority of Estonia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under RED 2014/53/EU is the primary mandatory requirement for wireless devices on the Estonian market, enforced by TTJA. SRRC, CCC, and FCC are not recognised. Chinese manufacturers must complete full RED conformity assessment (testing, DoC, CE mark, EU AR) before first shipment to Estonia. Estonia's digital leadership (e-Estonia) and CERT-EE's active cybersecurity enforcement posture elevate market surveillance scrutiny for Chinese-branded wireless and IoT products, particularly for cybersecurity-related conformity evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] RED 2014/53/EU下的CE标志是爱沙尼亚市场无线设备的主要强制要求，由TTJA负责执行。SRRC、CCC和FCC均不被认可。中国制造商须在首次向爱沙尼亚发货前完成完整的RED合格评定（检测、合格声明、CE标志、欧盟授权代表）。爱沙尼亚的数字化领先地位（e-Estonia）和CERT-EE积极的网络安全执法态势提升了对中国品牌无线和物联网产品的市场监督审查力度，尤其是网络安全相关合规证明方面。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] RED 2014/53/EU下的CE標誌是愛沙尼亞市場無線設備的主要強制要求，由TTJA負責執行。SRRC、CCC和FCC均不被認可。中國製造商須在首次向愛沙尼亞發貨前完成完整的RED合格評定（檢測、合格聲明、CE標誌、歐盟授權代表）。愛沙尼亞的數位領先地位（e-Estonia）和CERT-EE積極的網路安全執法態勢提升了對中國品牌無線和物聯網產品的市場監督審查力度，尤其是網路安全相關合規證明方面。
